overview.title: Overview
overview.empty_sub: New documents appear here as soon as they are placed in the watched folder.
queue.title: Queue
queue.subtitle: Documents in the watched folder that have not yet been confirmed and processed.
queue.empty_sub: As soon as a file is placed in the watched folder, it appears here automatically.
review.title: Review document
review.choose_date_hint: All detected dates. One is preselected — switch if needed.
review.msg_target_required: Choose at least one target folder.
config.title: Configuration
config.subtitle: Configuration as YAML. Validated on save.
config.errors_title: Configuration not applied — the previous one remains in effect
config.footnote: Applies to newly arriving documents; already analyzed ones keep their suggestion. To re-evaluate, place the file in the watched folder again.
summary.title: Summary
summary.subtitle: Review the filing. No file is changed without this confirmation.
summary.conflict_rest: No suffix is added automatically — please change the name in the review. Execution is locked.
upload.title: Upload PDFs
upload.dropzone: Drag PDFs here or click to choose
upload.err_write: The file could not be saved.
